Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC01B "THEHELM-8700-C01B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8700 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Helm, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $8700 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$86E0 - $8E2F $9EF0 - $CFFF
